arts.ttl: Gary Neville banned by Nottingham Forest over 'grudge' as Sky Sports respond to demand for Chelsea clash
arts.sum: The former man Utd star has been critical of Forest and owner Evangelos Marinakis who has named Neville in a recent lawsuit

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest bidding to break club record in pivotal Premier League game against Chelsea
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will be bidding to set a new club record when they square off against Chelsea in Sunday's pivotal Premier League fixture at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Chelsea lineup vs. Nottingham Forest: Predicted XI for Premier League clash as Christopher Nkunku call made
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Chelsea could line up for Sunday's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest.
